name: login-commandline-bootstrap
desc: Use the client's RE-confirmed InputFromCommandLine login bootstrap for the playable EXE. This bypasses the remastered native-layout input hitbox regression without inventing a new server path: the client still sends its built-in 127.0.0.1:47900 / ginei00 / dummy login flow to the authoritative server.
verified: RE-confirmed in FUN_0051a370 case 0/case 0x6e and tools/logh7_session_setup_trigger.py: VA 0x0051a496 is the zero-check branch that sends normal UI startup to the login form; falling through sets state 0x6e, logs InputFromCommandLine, calls FUN_0051bd70/FUN_004ea730, then uses the static argv table at 0x0076ee04 (G7MTClient.exe, 127.0.0.1, 47900, ginei00, 1, dummy). Same-length NOP keeps the native client on the proven robot bootstrap path.

patches.note: login sequence case 0: force fallthrough into the built-in InputFromCommandLine bootstrap
